item.title: Good way to make some extra money and provide and important service to the community.
item.description: What did she do with the money? Got nuggets. https://www.instagram.com/emmnasstics
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: In 2018, an 8-year-old girl and her mom were driving when they saw bikers crash. The mom, a nurse, rushed to help treat the injured. About a year passed and the girl set up a lemonade stand. This was the bikers’ way of saying, "Thank you."
item.dc:creator: kenistod

item.title: Let me save you a little time
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Landon Reid (@and_mayhem_ensued_) – "I Love You Even Though You're Not White: The JD and Usha Vance Story” – A Little Golden Toilet Book about JD and Usha Vance
item.description: Landon Reid: My new little golden toilet book has officially entered the chat. "I Love You Even Though You're Not White: The JD and Usha Vance Story” – written and illustrated by me. Yes, it's tiny. Yes, it's gold. Yes, it lives perfectly beside your toilet where all great political reflection happens..This is satire. This is camp. This is me with a pen, a highlighter, and absolutely no supervision. Every illustration is hand-done, every page crafted with love.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Phone-clearing dump 412
item.description:
WTF mate
Actual pic of my husband and I
All hail Anoia! The Goddess of Things That Get Stuck in Drawers. Also, GNU STP
And enfleurage perfumes by pressing flowers in to fat (butter. It was butter and no it did not turn out nice).
Palaeeudyptes klekowskii was taller, but kumimanu fordyce was bigger.
A rise, getting thrown off ättestupan…. One of them.

item.title: A little humor dump, but wait for the mechanical Manta Ray..
item.description:
John Cleese would approve
When there was time for everything
The level of detail in this mechanical Stingray is absolutely insane. Shut up and take my money!
Monkey century egg reaction.
item.dc:creator: yerimul23

item.title: The Domz (@thedomzatx): "Our Don is an awesome Don – Photos don't lie"
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Sandra and Latif Hafraoui, a New Jersey couple that voted for Trump 3 times, were SHOCKED when Latif, originally from Morocco was arrested by ICE and spent months in detention, facing legal fees of $50,000 and unable to work.
item.description: When Sandra was asked what she'd say to Trump, she said: “You said you were going after the worst of the worst, but instead you ruined our life.”
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.description: A handsome fellow fox

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @EDCcoins made this really cool fidget thingy! I want one!
27 Man Tax: Prince
“England has forty-two religions and only two sauces.” - Voltaire So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 ***Also if you miss abbiistabbii's discord community good news! Here's the new one https://discord.gg/NPStJGgARq - where everyone's reconnecting, shitposting, and hanging out again*** https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: 21 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 203
item.description:
This is my boy Archie (tabby) & my girl Frankie (Siamese) on the night we brought them home. ~u/aloneinmyroom79
Puff Puff, the forlorn orange triangle, checking in. ~u/DField118
This was a hard one to learn. In the end I used probabilities, and it has worked out well.
Consolidate.
~u/UniGirl114 Thanks very much to the people that helped me out. I appreciate you all.
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: While the men's US hockey team dined on fast food...
item.description:
The women's US hockey team got to meet acting legend and cuisine afficionado Stanley Tucci and enjoy a fabulous Italian meal together. https://www.nbcolympics.com/videos/stanley-tucci-has-meal-us-womens-hockey-team
EDIT: *** THANK YOU, for the Accolades! ***

item.title: I don't care how old this is, as someone who just came out of court getting the best result for my son, it made me laugh! Yes, live everyday like this, because the world doesn't give a shit otherwise!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Although a perfect fit for Trump's Administration, Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer was not picked as the designated survivor – Rachel Maddow with a funny story
item.description: Trump's designated survivor for the State of the Union address appears to once again be Secretary of Veterans Affairs Doug Collins. Democratic Rep. Mike Thompson (D-CA) was chosen by House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries as the Democrats' designated survivor.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: All news and media is now being fed to you by MAGA Republicans. Literally all of it. And they control censorship on almost all social media platforms, the vast majority of which are also owned by far right wing Trump supporters and zionists.
item.dc:creator: Freyja33

item.title: BUddy Gator - The Starry Night
item.dc:creator: BuddyGator

item.title: Phone Clearing Dump (Mostly Gaming MEMES, That I Pulled From My Vault To Help You Get Trough Friday) #819
item.description:
1. She went to bard's college and is ashamed of it? She doesn't like magic?!
2. WTF?!
3
4. Somewhere out there some dev spent two years of their life tirelessly working on game, for it to just in on your backlog, while you to play Animal Crossing for the 1000th time
5
6. I wish I had a copy of OOunga-Bunga 24 (20 2024 B.C. that is)
7. How do we know they are not NPCs
8. Wish we could bring back all of these!
9. You ruined gaming!
10
11. Why Netflix, why?!?!?
12
13. Dang it! Just let me have fun!
14. Look at that cat's face!!!
Hello everyone! We are a two brother team and we are making a game inspired by the book Obedience to Authority as well as media such as Papers, Please and the show Severance. Here in Eastern Europe we have experience and past with harsh authority and authoritarianism. I mean look at our oppressive leftover architecture! I guess the subject has always interested me... "Why do good people follow evil orders?" Our game tests if you obey orders and how does your moral compass work (if at all). I invite you try it! Check out our Steam page and if you like the premise, please wishlist! ? https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment Have a happy Friday!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
